title: proskomma #4348
definition:
1) a stumbling block
    1a) an obstacle in the way which if one strikes his foot against
        he stumbles or falls
    1b) that over which a soul stumbles i.e. by which is caused to sin
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) a stumbling block
    1a) an obstacle in the way which if one strikes his foot against
        he stumbles or falls
    1b) that over which a soul stumbles i.e. by which is caused to sin
